name: mmlispdrv
description: MMLispDRV — Z80 sound driver (Phase 3) with a first-party assemble/emulate/trace toolchain

scripts.verify:stress: node tools/verify.mjs tests/stress-m1.mmlisp --frames 1800 && node tools/verify.mjs tests/stress-m2skip.mmlisp --frames 1200
scripts.verify:m2: node tools/verify.mjs tests/m2-motion.mmlisp --frames 800 && node tools/verify.mjs tests/m2b-pitch.mmlisp --frames 500
scripts.verify:all: npm run selftest && npm run verify && npm run verify:stress && npm run verify:m2
